meta.project: FIFA World Cup 2026 Smart Stadium Operating System

product_overview: A multi-platform smart stadium web application for the FIFA World Cup 2026 that combines fan services, match intelligence, operations monitoring, AI insights, and infrastructure management. Users can explore live match data, manage tickets and profiles, access venue services, and monitor stadium operations from a single interface.
core_goals: Explore the platform and navigate to the appropriate module for a fan, operations, AI, or infrastructure task.
Sign in or register to access personal account features and preferences.
View live match information, team and player analytics, and tournament standings.
Manage fan-related activities such as tickets, stadium navigation, food and beverage, and merchandise browsing.
Review stadium operations and infrastructure status through monitoring dashboards and summaries.
Use AI insights and recommendations to support operational and executive decision-making.

features.name: Home Navigation
features.description: Provides the landing page entry point for exploring the platform’s main modules and jumping into key fan, operations, AI, and infrastructure areas.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the platform overview -> Open the fan dashboard from the landing page -> See personalized fan content
Navigate to / -> View the platform overview -> Open any module card -> Arrive at the selected module page
Navigate to / -> View the platform overview -> Open the infrastructure portal -> Arrive at the infrastructure hub
Navigate to / -> View the platform overview -> Open the AI portal -> Arrive at the AI hub
Navigate to / -> View the platform overview -> Open the operations portal -> Arrive at the operations hub

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allows users to create an account or sign in with email and password, then proceed into the authenticated experience.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Choose sign in mode -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the form -> See successful access to the account area
Navigate to /auth -> Choose registration mode -> Enter email -> Enter password -> Submit the form -> See account creation confirmation
Navigate to /auth -> Enter an invalid email format -> Enter a password -> Submit the form -> See validation feedback
Navigate to /auth -> Switch between sign in and registration modes -> Review the updated form fields -> Continue with the desired account action

features.name: Fan Dashboard
features.description: Shows a personalized fan view with live match information and quick links to core fan services.
user_flows: Navigate to /fan-dashboard -> View live match cards -> Review match statistics -> Continue to a related fan service
Navigate to /fan-dashboard -> Wait for content to load -> See dashboard skeletons -> View the loaded match and ticket summaries
Navigate to /fan-dashboard -> Open the tickets section from the dashboard -> Arrive at ticket management
Navigate to /fan-dashboard -> Open the food and beverage section from the dashboard -> Arrive at food ordering
Navigate to /fan-dashboard -> Open the stadium navigation section from the dashboard -> Arrive at wayfinding

features.name: Fan Profile and Preferences
features.description: Lets users review and manage their profile information, preferences, badges, and account-related settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /fan-profile -> View profile details -> Review preferences and badges -> Adjust account settings
Navigate to /fan-profile -> Review notification preferences -> Update selected preferences -> Save the changes
Navigate to /fan-profile -> View personal account information -> Confirm current display details and settings

features.name: Match Center
features.description: Provides live match statistics and event tracking for current games.
user_flows: Navigate to /match-center -> View live match statistics -> Review event tracking updates -> Follow the match state as it changes
Navigate to /match-center -> Review the current live match list -> Open match details from the feed -> Inspect scores, minute, and status

features.name: Team Analytics
features.description: Shows team-level statistics, standings, and performance metrics for comparing teams.
user_flows: Navigate to /team-analytics -> View team statistics -> Review standings and performance metrics -> Compare team outcomes
Navigate to /team-analytics -> Inspect the current standings -> Review performance trends -> Return to the team summary

features.name: Player Analytics
features.description: Displays player statistics and comparison views so users can evaluate individual performance.
user_flows: Navigate to /player-analytics -> View player statistics -> Compare players -> Review performance differences
Navigate to /player-analytics -> Open a player comparison view -> Inspect the statistical breakdown -> Return to the player list

features.name: Tournament Center
features.description: Summarizes group stage progress, standings, knockout bracket status, and awards.
user_flows: Navigate to /tournament-center -> View group standings -> Review knockout bracket progress -> Inspect awards information
Navigate to /tournament-center -> Review the tournament overview -> Check group and bracket status -> Continue tracking the competition

features.name: Tickets
features.description: Supports ticket browsing and ticket management for fans attending the event.
user_flows: Navigate to /tickets -> View available or owned tickets -> Review ticket details -> Continue with ticket management
Navigate to /tickets -> Review ticket availability -> Select a ticket option -> Proceed with the purchase or reservation flow
Navigate to /tickets -> View an empty ticket state -> Browse matches to find tickets

features.name: Stadium Navigation
features.description: Helps users find stadium maps and facility locations for wayfinding inside the venue.
user_flows: Navigate to /stadium-navigation -> View the stadium map -> Locate a facility -> Plan the route inside the venue
Navigate to /stadium-navigation -> Search for a venue area or facility -> Review the displayed location guidance -> Continue to the destination

features.name: Food and Beverage
features.description: Lets fans browse menus, review queue times, and place orders for food and drinks.
user_flows: Navigate to /food-beverage -> View the food menu -> Review queue times -> Choose an item to order
Navigate to /food-beverage -> Browse available concessions -> Select food or drink items -> Continue with ordering
Navigate to /food-beverage -> Review menu options and expected wait times -> Decide where to order from

features.name: Merchandise Shop
features.description: Allows fans to browse the official merchandise catalog for tournament apparel and goods.
user_flows: Navigate to /merchandise -> View the merchandise catalog -> Review item details -> Continue browsing official products
Navigate to /merchandise -> Browse available merchandise -> Select a product to inspect -> Return to the catalog

features.name: Infrastructure Management
features.description: Provides a hub for monitoring stadium infrastructure systems and accessing specialized infrastructure modules.
user_flows: Navigate to /infrastructure -> View KPI widgets and system status cards -> Review infrastructure health summaries -> Open a sub-module
Navigate to /infrastructure -> Access the energy module -> Review energy monitoring data
Navigate to /infrastructure -> Access the parking module -> Review parking availability and occupancy
Navigate to /infrastructure -> Open settings or audit pages -> Review configuration or compliance information

features.name: Energy Monitoring
features.description: Shows energy usage and related infrastructure metrics for stadium power management.
user_flows: Navigate to /infrastructure/energy -> View energy monitoring metrics -> Review consumption and production indicators -> Return to the infrastructure hub
Navigate to /infrastructure/energy -> Inspect the current energy status -> Compare it with the reported peak values -> Continue monitoring

features.name: Smart Parking
features.description: Displays parking status and smart parking management information for venue access.
user_flows: Navigate to /infrastructure/parking -> View parking availability -> Review zone status -> Continue monitoring parking capacity
Navigate to /infrastructure/parking -> Inspect parking zones -> Compare available spaces across zones -> Return to the infrastructure hub

features.name: Infrastructure Settings
features.description: Lets authorized users review and adjust infrastructure-related settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /infrastructure/settings -> Review the current settings panel -> Adjust configuration options -> Save the changes
Navigate to /infrastructure/settings -> Open the settings panel -> Update selected infrastructure preferences -> Confirm the updated configuration

features.name: Infrastructure Audit
features.description: Provides audit and compliance tracking for infrastructure activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /infrastructure/audit -> View the audit timeline -> Review compliance records -> Continue to another infrastructure area
Navigate to /infrastructure/audit -> Inspect recent audit entries -> Review the tracked actions -> Return to the hub

features.name: AI Command Center
features.description: Presents AI-powered insights and operational intelligence in a command-center style dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /ai/command-center -> View AI insights and recommendations -> Review dashboard widgets -> Open a related AI module
Navigate to /ai/command-center -> Inspect the current recommendations -> Compare insight cards -> Return to the AI hub
Navigate to /ai/command-center -> Interact with dashboard widgets -> Review the surfaced operational guidance

features.name: AI Platform Hub
features.description: Provides the AI landing area for moving between AI sub-modules and intelligence views.
user_flows: Navigate to /ai -> View the AI platform overview -> Open a sub-module -> Continue into the selected AI experience
Navigate to /ai -> Review the available AI sections -> Choose an intelligence area -> Arrive at the corresponding page

routes.description: Home page with module navigation cards
Login and registration with email/password and OAuth providers
Personalized fan dashboard with live matches and tickets
User profile, preferences, badges, and account settings
Live match statistics and event tracking
Team statistics, standings, and performance metrics
Groups, standings, knockout bracket, and awards
Food menus, queue times, and ordering

features.name: Home Navigation
features.description: Browse all platform modules from the landing page
user_interactions: View hero section and platform overview
Click Get Started to open fan dashboard
Click module cards to navigate to each section
Access infrastructure, AI, and operations portals

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and registration with email/password and social OAuth
user_interactions: Toggle between login and register modes
Use OAuth provider buttons (Google, Apple, Microsoft, etc.)
See validation errors on invalid input

features.name: Fan Dashboard
features.description: Personalized dashboard with live match data and quick actions
user_interactions: View live match cards and statistics
Navigate to tickets, food, and navigation modules
See loading skeletons while data loads

features.name: Infrastructure Management
features.description: Monitor and manage stadium infrastructure systems
user_interactions: View KPI widgets and system status cards
Navigate to energy, parking, water, waste sub-modules

features.name: AI Command Center
features.description: AI-powered analytics and operational intelligence
user_interactions: Interact with command center dashboard widgets

known_limitations.issue: Static export mode disables Next.js server-side API routes
known_limitations.impact: Frontend relies on external backend API at NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL

known_limitations.issue: Firebase auth requires configured environment variables
known_limitations.impact: OAuth and Firebase login may fail without valid Firebase config
